name: Contact Gate
desc: Banish 2 "Neo-Spacian" monsters with different names from your GY; Special Summon 2 "Neo-Spacian" monsters with different names from your hand, Deck, and/or GY, also, for the rest of this turn<!---Missing comma---> you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. If a face-up Fusion Monster that mentions "Elemental HERO Neos" as material returns from your field to the Extra Deck: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 of your banished "Neo-Spacian" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Contact Gate" per turn.
eff: Banish 2 "Neo-Spacian" monsters with different names from your GY; Special Summon 2 "Neo-Spacian" monsters with different names from your hand, Deck, and/or GY, also, for the rest of this turn<!---Missing comma---> you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. If a face-up Fusion Monster that mentions "Elemental HERO Neos" as material returns from your field to the Extra Deck: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 of your banished "Neo-Spacian" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Contact Gate" per turn.

sets.set: Cybernetic Horizon Sneak Peek Participation Card

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
